bannerText: A focused one-month Pro plan for members who want contact sharing and safer introductions.
assistiveContent: Useful when you already have a shortlist and want faster introductions.

packages.pkgBenefit: Unlock contact sharing, Engage+, 25 contact details, and a gold badge.
packages.assistiveContent: Best first upgrade from Bronze when you are ready to connect.

bannerText: Pro Max adds stronger contact limits, Super Interests, and one monthly spotlight.
assistiveContent: Best for families comparing matches seriously with guided support.

packages.pkgBenefit: Adds 50 contact details, 50 Super Interests, one spotlight, and a gold badge.
packages.assistiveContent: Best for serious matching with stronger monthly reach.

bannerText: Pro Supreme gives the highest monthly limits and strongest discovery reach.
assistiveContent: Best when the family wants guided support and maximum access.

packages.pkgBenefit: Includes 80 contact details, 80 Super Interests, three spotlights, and a gold badge.
packages.assistiveContent: Best when the family wants maximum access and visibility.
